items.title: Race for Europe: How it stands and remaining games
items.summary: As the Premier League season nears its conclusion, who are favourites to secure a place in Europe next season, and how many English teams could qualify?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Sinner begins bid for history with win in Rome
items.summary: Jannik Sinner begins his bid for more history with a straightforward victory over Sebastian Ofner in the Italian Open second round.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
